hero.title: Chrisi Cake
hero.subtitle: Custom Cakes to Order
hero.description: Handcrafted dream cakes for your unforgettable moments — made with love and the finest ingredients.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hello! I'm Christina, the founder of Chrisi Cake. My passion for baking began in childhood, when I stood in the kitchen with my grandmother and discovered the magic of baking.
about.p2: Today I create every cake with dedication, using only high-quality, fresh ingredients. For me, every cake is a unique work of art — I work exclusively with modern decoration techniques and completely avoid fondant.
about.p3: I'm based in Bern, Switzerland, and I look forward to crowning your special occasion with an unforgettable cake.

prices.title: Prices
prices.subtitle: Pricing
prices.intro: Prices for my cakes vary depending on weight, design complexity and choice of ingredients.

items.label: Extra decorations
items.desc: Edible photos, fresh flowers, cake toppers

items.label: Individual quote
items.desc: Since every cake is unique, I'm happy to create a personal quote

items.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
items.a: To guarantee the quality and freshness of my creations, I accept orders for a minimum of 10 persons.

items.q: When can I pick up my order?
items.a: Pickup is available Monday to Saturday after 18:00.
Please note that I do not work on Sundays and no pickups or deliveries are possible on this day.

items.q: How far in advance do I need to order?
items.a: Please place your order at least 5 days before your desired date.
To reserve the date, a deposit of 30.- CHF is required by bank transfer or Twint. The remaining balance is paid at pickup.

items.q: How does the ordering process work?
items.a: Your order is only officially confirmed once you receive a personal confirmation from me (by email or phone).
No, I work exclusively with modern decoration techniques and completely avoid fondant.

items.name: Anna M.
items.text: The cake was absolutely beautiful and incredibly delicious! Christina perfectly fulfilled my wishes. All guests were thrilled!

items.name: Michael S.
items.text: Ordered for the second time and top quality again! You can really taste the quality of the ingredients. Highly recommended!

items.name: Sabrina K.
items.text: Dreamy wedding cake, exactly as I imagined it. Professional, punctual and simply delicious. Thank you Christina!

storage.title: Transport & Storage
storage.subtitle: Recommendations for delivery and storage
tips: If you're arriving by car, you can place the cake on the floor of the passenger seat. Make sure it stands at a 90-degree angle to the floor.
Do not hold the cake by the handle, as it is heavy and could break.
I strongly recommend always keeping the cake at a 90-degree angle.
The cake can only be stored in the refrigerator. If the temperature allows, it can also be stored in a box on the balcony (+3, +5 degrees).
The cake's shelf life is 3 days (72 hours).
If the cake is multi-tiered, there are stands and food tubes under each tier, along with a wooden center axis.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Do you have questions or would you like to order a cake for your event? I look forward to your message!
